metadata.credit: Data and analysis provided by Draftsim
metadata.author: Bryan Hohns (Veveil)

set_overview.summary: Dominaria United is a colorful and diverse set with a lot of depth, supporting multiple viable archetypes across two, three, or even five colors.
color_ranking: Color balance is even — pair-driven format.

color_notes.{W} White: Primarily aggressive with tokens theme. Destroy Evil, Citizen's Arrest, Argivian Cavalier, Captain's Call, Take Up the Shield.
color_notes.{U} Blue: Versatile for control, tempo, and domain. Tolarian Geyser, Essence Scatter, Talas Lookout, Tolarian Terror, Shore Up.
color_notes.{B} Black: Grindiest color with strong 2-for-1 value. Extinguish the Light, Phyrexian Rager, Urborg Repossession, Tribute to Urborg, Eerie Soultender.
color_notes.{R} Red: Weakest standalone color for aggression. Meria's Outrider (sleeper common), Lightning Strike, Flowstone Infusion, Flowstone Kavu, Keldon Strike Team.
color_notes.{G} Green: Mana fixing specialist with domain support. Gaea's Might, Bite Down, Floriferous Vinewall, Sunbathing Rootwalla, Yavimaya Sojourner.

key_gameplay_notes: Domain requires careful mana base construction — walk a tightrope between dual lands and mana generation.
Kicker cards usually played for their kicked modes except for certain utility creatures.
Sagas underperform except three exceptions (Elder Dragon War, Weatherseed Treaty, Cruelty of Gix).
Green provides crucial mana fixing for multicolor strategies.
Red aggro struggles with a weak common creature base.

mechanics.name: Kicker
mechanics.summary: Every kicker card functions as two cards in one. No card has a kicker cost of the same color as its base cost, requiring two-color pairs or mana fixing.
mechanics.performance: Universal value mechanic; flexible across all archetypes.

mechanics.name: Domain
mechanics.summary: Rewards controlling multiple basic land types. Two basics is baseline; more triggers additional payoffs.
mechanics.performance: Defines multicolor builds. Big rewards come from Herd Migration and similar cards.

mechanics.name: Enlist
mechanics.summary: When this creature attacks, you may tap a non-attacking untapped creature you control to add its power to this one. Lets you attack into unfavorable boards.

key_examples.name: Guardian of New Benalia
key_examples.note: Easily the best enlist card in the set.

mechanics.name: Read Ahead (Sagas)
mechanics.summary: Sagas function as three cards in one by choosing the starting chapter. Only three sagas are rated excellent.
mechanics.performance: Most sagas underperform. Top three: The Elder Dragon War, The Weatherseed Treaty, The Cruelty of Gix.

archetypes.name: Azorius Tokens/Spells
archetypes.strategy: Go-wide tempo deck mixing tokens with instants/sorceries. Fliers, bounce, and token generators.

archetypes.name: Izzet Prowess
archetypes.strategy: Aggressive spell-focused deck leveraging prowess creatures. Capable of sudden lethal damage.

archetypes.name: Golgari Self-Mill
archetypes.strategy: Graveyard-focused good-stuff deck. Synergizes with self-mill and Urborg Repossession.

archetypes.name: Dimir Control
archetypes.strategy: Most controlling color pair. Overlaps with blue spells. Sustained value via Vohar plus Urborg Repossession.

archetypes.name: Selesnya Tokens
archetypes.strategy: Better pure tokens strategy. Strength of the Coalition is a must-have mass pump spell.

archetypes.name: Orzhov Sacrifice
archetypes.strategy: Midrange/value tokens variant. Balances curve, card advantage, and removal.

archetypes.name: Boros Aggro
archetypes.strategy: Traditional attack-focused strategy with tokens sub-theme. Synergizes with enlist creatures.

archetypes.name: Rakdos Sacrifice
archetypes.strategy: Blends aggression with sacrifice synergies. Lacks great 2-drops and adequate common fodder for the sacrifice theme.

archetypes.name: Domain Variants (5c)
archetypes.strategy: Five-color strategy rewarding mana base diversity. Three approaches: Simic-based, Gruul-based, and non-green versions.

general_tips: Evaluate kicker cards for both base and kicked modes.
Understand domain thresholds before drafting payoff cards.
Prioritize removal (Extinguish the Light, Destroy Evil) highly.
Be aware of sweepers when building token strategies.
Sagas are usually traps — only three sagas merit dedicated draft priority.
Green is the splash enabler — Floriferous Vinewall and similar fix mana for 3c+ builds.
